subcodes.first_line: O beloved of my heart! Blessed are the souls who, beneath the canopy of the Word of Unity, have quaffed from the chalice of the Covenant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار قلبی خوشا بحال نفوسیکه در ظل کلمه وحدانیت از کاس میثاق نوشیدند و از
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @firmness in the Covenant, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
